title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 426.300 - Dismissal of assignee — books to be delivered to successor
text:
426.300.  Dismissal of assignee — books to be delivered to successor. — When any assignee shall be dismissed from his trust, the court shall order all the books, papers, effects, moneys and evidences of debt to be forthwith delivered to his successor in the trust, or to such other persons as the court shall appoint to receive the same for the time being.
(RSMo 1939 § 5768) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5658; 1919 § 654; 1909 § 927
